items.title: Watch a live World Cup match
items.detail: Anywhere. Any round. Just once in a stadium with 80,000 people.

items.title: Safari in the Serengeti during the Great Migration
items.detail: The real one — not a reserve.

items.title: A real conversation with a sitting Head of State
items.detail: Not a photo op. An actual conversation about governance and policy.

items.title: Meal with someone who built something that lasted 50+ years
items.detail: And ask what they'd do differently.

items.title: Guest on a podcast with 100K+ listeners
items.detail: Talking AI, governance, or diaspora leadership.

items.title: Publish a book that sells 10,000+ copies
items.detail: The premarital counselling workbook or the parenting book.

items.title: Brief a government minister on AI policy
items.detail: In a room where the policy is actually being written.

items.title: Complete the PhD
items.detail: LLM adoption in nonprofits. University of Alberta.

items.title: Watch my daughter perform at a venue she's proud of
See Haven Icecream open a second location
items.detail: The hub-and-spoke model working as designed.

items.title: Return to Kampala with my kids
